subject: A young anime-style figure with long blonde twin-tail pigtails and wide purple eyes, seated at a table with Japanese food items
description: A young figure with very long blonde twin-tail pigtails and wide, expressive purple eyes sits at a restaurant table or kitchen counter, wearing a light green casual hoodie or apron. The table in front of her holds multiple Japanese food items — what appears to be bowls of rice and other dishes. Her expression is open-mouthed and slightly surprised or eager. The background is a warm-toned indoor restaurant or kitchen setting with green tones and shelving visible. Art style is bright cel-shaded anime.
foreground: Blonde twin-tail figure in green hoodie seated at a table with Japanese food bowls
background: Warm indoor restaurant or kitchen environment with shelving
emotion: open-mouthed surprise or eager anticipation — wide-eyed expression
